elections.note: Certified final = 'Total Voters' 428,543 (Precinct 202,478 + Vote-By-Mail 226,065), CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County (Sacramento row; 63.12% of 678,923 registered; URL has SoS typo 'particpation'). Election-night numerator NOT RECOVERABLE: Sacramento County posted election-night results on the e-CERS vendor system (sacresults.e-cers.com), but the Internet Archive did not crawl it on election night. The earliest archived capture (resultsVoterTurnout.aspx, snapshot 20101107) embeds a server-side 'Last Refresh: 11/5/2010 4:56:53 PM' = 3 days after the Nov 2 election, by which point 323,581 ballots (47.66% of registered, 1158/1158 precincts) were already counted — a days-late cumulative figure, NOT the ~8pm first report. No election-night (~Nov 3 04:00-09:00 UTC) snapshot exists, and contemporaneous news did not report a county ballot-count first report. Pre-e-pollbook (adopted 2018), no automated signature verification. Value left null per methodology (do not substitute a days-late cumulative for the election-night first report).

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 522,045 (Precinct 216,021 + Vote-By-Mail 306,024), CA SoS SoV (Sacramento row; 74.70% of 698,899 registered). Election-night numerator NOT RECOVERABLE: earliest archived e-CERS capture (sacresults.e-cers.com default page, snapshot 20121110) embeds 'Last Refresh: 11/9/2012 4:12:06 PM' = 3 days after the Nov 6 election (1106/1106 precincts). The earliest archived turnout page (snapshot 20121120) shows 'Last Refresh 11/19/2012' with 493,595 ballots (70.62%) — near-final, ~13 days late. No election-night (~Nov 7 04:00-09:00 UTC) snapshot exists; news did not report a county ballot-count first report. Pre-e-pollbook, no ASV. Value left null (no election-night first-report figure available).

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 330,817 (Precinct 111,628 + Vote-By-Mail 219,189), CA SoS SoV (Sacramento row; 48.39% of 683,632 registered; URL has SoS typo 'particpiation'). Election-night numerator NOT RECOVERABLE: the e-CERS results page was archived only pre-poll-close on Nov 4 (snapshot 20141104, election-day morning) and then days later — the earliest post-close countywide capture (resultsSW, snapshot 20141108) embeds 'Last Refresh: 11/6/2014 8:46:44 AM' = 2 days after the Nov 4 election (1263/1263 precincts), and no resultsVoterTurnout page (which carries the ballot total) was archived for the 2014 general at all. No election-night (~Nov 5 04:00-09:00 UTC) snapshot exists; news did not report a county ballot-count first report. Pre-e-pollbook, no ASV. Value left null.

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 575,711 (Precinct 203,114 + Vote-By-Mail 372,597), CA SoS SoV (Sacramento row; 74.49% of 772,865 registered). Election-night numerator NOT RECOVERABLE: earliest archived e-CERS default-page capture (snapshot 20161110) embeds 'Last Refresh: 11/9/2016 1:10:20 PM' = the afternoon AFTER (~17h+ past poll close, 1267/1267 precincts) and carries no ballot total; the earliest turnout page (snapshot 20161113) shows 'Last Refresh 11/11/2016' with 385,520 ballots (49.89%) — 3 days late. No true election-night (~Nov 9 04:00-09:00 UTC) snapshot exists; news did not report a county ballot-count first report. Pre-e-pollbook, no ASV. Value left null (no ~8pm first-report figure available).

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 522,652 (in-person/vote-center 30,279 + Vote-By-Mail 492,373), CA SoS SoV (Sacramento*, the asterisk denotes a Voter's Choice Act vote-center county; 68.23% of 765,965 registered). Election-night ballots = 185,623 (24.26% turnout, 764,998 registered, 100.0% precincts reported) from the county's official VoterTurnoutDetails.aspx page rendered from the earliest archived capture (snapshot 20181107 17:23 UTC). REPORT-TIME CAVEAT: the page's embedded 'Results last updated: 11/7/2018 1:59:46 AM PT' shows this is the END-OF-ELECTION-NIGHT update (the last tally of the night, ~2am), NOT the ~8pm first report — no ~8pm snapshot was archived. So 185,623 is an UPPER bound on the strict first-report metric (the 8pm VBM first tranche would be smaller) and is not directly comparable to the true ~8pm first reports recorded for 2022/2024; 'ballots left to process' was estimated at 175,000. First November general after Sacramento County's 2018 switch to the Voter's Choice Act / vote centers with electronic pollbooks. No ASV. confidence secondary (end-of-night proxy, not 8pm first report).

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 484,315 (in-person/vote-center 28,929 + Vote-By-Mail 455,386), CA SoS SoV (Sacramento*, VCA vote-center county; 55.98% of 865,225 registered). Election-night ballots = 128,173 = the FIRST post-poll-close report, rendered from the official county results portal results.saccounty.gov (Wayback snapshot 20221109 04:37 UTC = 8:37pm PT Nov 8). The page banner reads 'Ballots Counted 128,173 / Voter Turnout 14.82% / Registered Voters 864,814 / Results last updated: 11/8/2022 8:12:54 PM PT' with 'Next Update 11/08/2022 at 10:15 p.m.' confirming this is the initial ~8pm tranche (no prior update that night). Post-e-pollbook (adopted 2018). No automated signature verification (ASV never adopted). confidence primary (true ~8pm first report, official source).

Certified final = 'Total Voters' 668,416 (in-person/vote-center 73,650 + Vote-By-Mail 594,766), CA SoS SoV (Sacramento*, VCA vote-center county; 75.12% of 889,806 registered). Election-night ballots = 278,871 = the FIRST post-poll-close report, rendered from the official county results portal results.saccounty.gov (Wayback snapshot 20241106 04:38 UTC = 8:38pm PT Nov 5). The page banner reads 'Ballots Counted 278,871 / Voter Turnout 31.35% / Registered Voters 889,465 / Results last updated: 11/5/2024 8:10:13 PM PT' with 'Next Update 11/05/2024 @ 10:15 p.m.' confirming this is the initial ~8pm tranche (no prior update that night). Post-e-pollbook. No ASV. confidence primary (true ~8pm first report, official source).
